form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (19.45) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 1 for the first time. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (19.45) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 1 for the first time. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Horsham over 410m. Last start finished 6th over 410m at Horsham beaten 6 lengths (23.39) behind Paw Palmer in a Mix 3/4 on April 14. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.75 lengths at Warrnambool (25.62) beating Doongalla Don in a Grade 5 on April 2. Must be included.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.68) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 6 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.75 lengths fourth (19.38) over 350m at this track. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 12 over 350m at this track behind Aston Rennes beaten 2.5 lengths (19.56) in a Grade 5. Not up to this.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Sandown over 515m. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (19.31) over 350m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and needs to bounce back.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability but this tough and will need some luck to feature.
